name: @posthog/ml-mirror-image-scrub
description: replay_vision image-scrub sidecar: an HTTP service that turns raw session-replay image bytes into scrubbed bytes (Stage 1 = sharp-only blur; Stage 2 swaps in the native ML scrub). The plugin-server consumer owns Kafka + S3 and calls this over localhost. Standalone package (not in pnpm-workspace.yaml) so its heavy Stage-2 ML deps never reach the root lockfile or the plugin-server image.
